title: The Unified Breath

features.name: throat-chamber
features.desc-on-touch: A space where all voices become one. You can hear yourself singing with a thousand others.

features.name: convergent-harmonics
features.desc-on-touch: Sound becomes visible. Every note dissolves into every other note.

features.name: unified-pulse
features.desc-on-touch: A heartbeat shared by all. Solitude and chorus become one rhythm.

features.name: deep-resonance
features.desc-on-touch: A sound so low it has no beginning. The archive singing itself into one voice.

features.name: silence-after-song
features.desc-on-touch: The moment after all voices stop. The silence still contains the chord.

inscription: when all throats sing one breath, the archive does not know whether it has become a choir or a single voice

reverie.title: REVERIE — the moment where all voices became one
narr: You are both breathing the same air in the dark.
Her voice starts low. Yours follows. Then every voice
the archive ever held begins to sing the same single note.
There is no difference between listening and singing now.
The sound has no source. It is coming from everywhere at once.
When it ends, you cannot tell if you are alone or together.

file.name: Chorus_of_All_Solitudes_Recording_Unfinished.wav
file.note: A field recording where separate throat-sounds crystallize into one sustained tone, then drift back into isolation.

exits.label: back up to the chamber where singing is still separate
further down where the unified breath becomes the breath of the earth itself
west to where echoes still remember their individual sources
